title: Borealis Dataverse DataFile
description: JSON Schema for a DataFile object returned by the Borealis native REST API, as used by the Universite de Montreal collection. Derived from the Dataverse v6.8.1 OpenAPI DataFile schema; only fields actually present in the spec are retained.

id.description: Internal numeric database identifier for the file.

storageIdentifier.description: Backing storage identifier for the file.

identifierRegistered.description: Whether the persistent identifier is registered.

createDate.description: Date the file record was created.

dtype.description: Internal discriminator type for the persisted DvObject.
